description: Among thousands of people twisting, bending and stretching on a ceremonial road in Delhi on Sunday morning was Prime Minister Narendra Modi, who led the first International Yoga Day celebrations across India. "Who would have thought that Rajpath would become Yoga Path," he said, moments before taking to the mat himself.
fulltitle: Narendra Modi doing Yoga at Rajpath makes World Record
